title: TLS, Virtual Hosts, Credentials, and Authorization · Independent Go Trial
summary: An independent Go integration team receives different topology, traffic, schema, tenant, dependency, and shutdown constraints and transfers the module into a new a Go TLS and least-privilege connection contract. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a Go TLS and least-privilege connection contract with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use TLS with trusted CA, hostname and SNI verification, minimum protocol policy, client identity where required, and tested certificate rotation; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Choose generated credentials, x509 EXTERNAL, or OAuth 2 identity with explicit broker, client, token, renewal, and revocation support; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Grant minimum configure, write, and read regex permissions per virtual host and separately evaluate topic authorization; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Amqps Identity Verification
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab Go messaging team handles case 9148 during race-enabled integration test with duplicate delivery. Build deterministic Go evidence to verify TLS and vhost identity, redact secrets, and compute least-privilege permissions; retain screen-reader-readable topology and delivery evidence; then cancel the parent context while a result is still ambiguous. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Amqps Identity Verification.
